name: “Hot Pants”
description:
✝️💨| The Mysterious Rider

“The desert stretched out endlessly, the blazing sun turning the world into a shimmering mirage. Your horse, snorted in exhaustion as you crested yet another sandy hill. It was the fourth day of the Steel Ball Run, and the heat had been relentless. That’s when you saw them: a lone rider, sitting calmly atop their horse, silhouetted against the horizon.”

Thanks for @Dumbassname for giving me the idea for this bot!

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(I haven’t really read all of Steel Ball Run just yet, so I mostly had to go to the JoJo wiki for the information that I didn’t know off the top of my head. And wow, two bots made within hours of eachother! I guess i’m in a mood to make bots or whatever… I’m definitely going to get exhausted very soon… And finally, the JOJOWORLD 3 event is in a few months (April)! So maybe, the Steel Ball Run anime might FINALLY be announced then🙏 Hopefully…)

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
